response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the mandatory C++ experience on Windows systems and domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets. While they have a strong background in languages like D, JavaScript, and TypeScript, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or involvement in financial systems. Domain knowledge is also missing, as their roles have been in general web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than capital markets or fixed income.
strengths: Strong software development background with 15+ years of experience across multiple domains and languages
Proven ability to work in team environments and contribute to open-source projects
Experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows platform (mandatory skill)
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience, or Summit platform knowledge
